name: Swiss-Crab Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped green bell pepper, optional
2 7 oz cans crabmeat, cartilage removed, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 6
In a skillet, melt the butter and lightly sauté the celery, onion, and green bell pepper. Remove from heat and stir in the flour. Dissolve the bouillon cubes in boiling water and add to the skillet along with boiling water. Stir constantly until sauce is slightly thickened.
Lightly toss remaining ingredients except for buttered bread crumbs and grated cheese in a slow cooker. Add the sauce and stir lightly to blend. Cover and cook on high heat for 3 to 5 hours.
Pour contents of the slow cooker into a shallow, heatproof serving dish. Sprinkle with buttered bread crumbs and grated cheese. Place under broiler until cheese is melted and bread crumbs are browned.
